result:
**Goal: Add a split-screen comparison mode that runs two simulations side-by-side in the same terminal.**

This would let you pick two different rulesets (or the same ruleset with different parameters/topologies) and watch them evolve simultaneously from the same initial pattern. The terminal would be divided into left and right panes, each rendering its own independent simulation, with a shared generation counter and the ability to pause/step/rewind each independently. Press `Tab` to switch which pane receives input.

This is a natural next step — the project has 20+ simulation modes but no way to visually compare them. A side-by-side view would make the differences between rulesets immediately tangible and is a feature no other terminal CA simulator typically offers.
